title: Muktheshwarar Temple, Kanchipuram
summary: Muktesvara Temple is a Hindu temple in the town of Kanchipuram, in Tamil Nadu, India. Dedicated to Shiva, the temple was constructed by the Pallavas and has inscriptions dating back to the time of Nandivarman II.
text:
Muktesvara Temple is a Hindu temple in the town of Kanchipuram, in Tamil Nadu, India. Dedicated to Shiva, the temple was constructed by the Pallavas and has inscriptions dating back to the time of Nandivarman II.

Nearest Hindu temple
